name: helios-sdk-tools
description: Build and install Helios node plugins from the SDK workspace.

commands.title: Helios SDK: Install Plugin From Path

heliosSdk.apiBase.description: Base URL for the Helios API (used for plugin installs).

heliosSdk.buildCommand.description: Shell command to build the current plugin.

heliosSdk.buildWorkingDirectory.description: Working directory for the build command. Defaults to the first workspace folder.

heliosSdk.pluginOutputPath.description: Path to the built .so plugin for installation.

heliosSdk.sdkRoot.description: Override path for the SDK root (defaults to IDE_SDK_DIR).

heliosSdk.projectsRoot.description: Override path for the SDK projects root (defaults to IDE_PROJECTS_DIR).
